headline.purpose: Page titles only. One per screen. e.g. 'Transações', 'Bancos'.

title.purpose: Section headings, card titles, sheet titles.

body.purpose: List content, description text, form field values. Dominant size.

label.purpose: Form labels, table column headers, badge text, metadata.

mono.purpose: Numeric amounts in data tables, invoice references, date strings needing column alignment.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, active). 150ms duration.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The singular primary action on any screen. Confident Indigo fill, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; background: oklch(0.640 0.210 272); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.640 0.210 272 / 80%); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.640 0.210 272); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.640 0.210 272 / 50%); } .ds-btn-primary:active:not(:disabled) { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Navigation-adjacent actions, icon buttons, cancel actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.985 0 0); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.269 0 0 / 50%); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.640 0.210 272); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.640 0.210 272 / 50%); } .ds-btn-icon { width: 32px; padding: 0; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Container for auth forms, invoice summaries, bank overview. Not for list items.
components.html:
Conta Nubank
Fechamento dia 15 · Vencimento dia 22
R$ 2.847,003 transações este mês
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.205 0 0); border-radius: 14px; outline: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 10%); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-header { padding: 16px 16px 0; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; margin-bottom: 2px; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.708 0 0); } .ds-card-content { padding: 12px 16px 16px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input for forms. Transparent bg, hairline border, indigo focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.985 0 0); } .ds-input { height: 32px; width: 100%; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.260 0 0); background: oklch(1 0 0 / 5%); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 0 10px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.708 0 0); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.640 0.210 272); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.640 0.210 272 / 50%); } .ds-input[aria-invalid='true'] { border-color: oklch(0.704 0.191 22.216); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.704 0.191 22.216 / 20%); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; background: oklch(0.220 0 0); }

components.name: Invoice Status Badges
components.description: Four invoice states. Each visually distinct. Tinted fill + matching text. Pill shape.
components.html: OPENCLOSEDOVERDUEPAID
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 20px; padding: 0 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-open { background: oklch(0.600 0.170 220 / 15%); color: oklch(0.600 0.170 220); } .ds-badge-closed { background: oklch(0.720 0.150 60 / 15%); color: oklch(0.720 0.150 60); } .ds-badge-overdue { background: oklch(0.704 0.191 22 / 15%); color: oklch(0.704 0.191 22.216); } .ds-badge-paid { background: oklch(0.600 0.150 145 / 15%); color: oklch(0.600 0.150 145); }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Collapsible sidebar with active state in Confident Indigo. Ghost for inactive, indigo tint for current route.
components.html: TransaçõesBancosCategoriasDívidas
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 32px; padding: 0 8px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.708 0 0); text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.269 0 0); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); } .ds-nav-active { background: oklch(0.640 0.210 272 / 15%); color: oklch(0.640 0.210 272); }

narrative.overview:
Cartero is a personal financial workspace that disappears into the task. The surface is always dark, always spare. Confidence comes from correctness, not decoration: every amount is formatted, every state is labeled, every action is unambiguous.

This system rejects the entire visual language of consumer finance apps. No green money gradients. No warm cream backgrounds. No gamified pie charts. No purple neobank branding. Cartero is a private ledger — the kind you keep because you care about accuracy.

What remains: Geist Sans in a tight, fixed scale; near-black surfaces separated by barely-there borders; and a single Confident Indigo accent that appears only where something needs to be done or is currently active.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-native: every value calibrated for dark backgrounds, no light-mode adaptations
Signal over noise: the violet accent is rare enough that its presence means something
Numbers first: monetary amounts receive visual priority — larger, bolder, formatted
Row-level density: lists use border-b rows, not individual cards
Semantic color: income green, ledger red, confident indigo — each carries exactly one meaning

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Confident Indigo appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point — it marks the singular action or active state.

rules.name: The No-Warm-Background Rule
rules.body: Background is always pure neutral — oklch(0.145 0 0), no chroma. The indigo accent provides all identity; warming the background is the AI cream-and-beige trap.

rules.name: The Amount Rule
rules.body: Monetary amounts always render as R$ formatted. Positive in Income Green, negative in Ledger Red, neutral in Ledger White. Never raw decimal strings.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: No clamp(), no fluid typography. Fixed rem values across breakpoints — this is a product UI at consistent viewport widths.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Design Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow anywhere. Depth is tonal, not shadow-based. If a surface needs to feel on top, lighten it by one tonal step.

dos: Do use Confident Indigo exclusively for primary buttons, active navigation, and focus rings. Keep coverage below 10% per screen.
Do format all monetary amounts as R$ 1.234,56 via Intl.NumberFormat('pt-BR').
Do use row + border-b patterns for transaction lists, debt lists, and receivables.
Do use Sheets or Dialogs for create/edit flows — never navigate to a new page for a form.
Do render skeletons during loading on the exact shape of the incoming content.
Do write empty states that teach the interface, not 'Nothing here.'
Do show action buttons only on row hover — hidden by default.
donts: Don't use a warm-tinted background. background is oklch(0.145 0 0) — pure neutral, zero chroma.
Don't add a light mode. The dark class is hardcoded; no toggle exists or should.
Don't use generic SaaS cream/beige aesthetics — warm neutral backgrounds, rounded-everything, soft pastels.
Don't adopt fintech green as the primary accent. Green is reserved for income/positive semantic meaning only.
Don't use banking blue (navy + gold) — no corporate trust-signal palette.
Don't gamify the interface — no bright category-color splashes, no playful illustrations, no animated celebration states.
Don't use box-shadow or drop-shadow. Depth is tonal.
Don't apply Confident Indigo to more than one distinct element per screen.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Never.
Don't add border-left colored stripes as card accents.
